name: Vamsi Koka
recommendation: Aryant is a highly motivated software professional with strong skills in development and UI/UX. He is creative, detail-oriented, and a quick learner who takes ownership of his work. He is a strong team player with good communication and problem-solving abilities, consistently delivers quality results, and shows a strong commitment to continuous improvement. He is highly recommended and would be a valuable asset to any organization.

name: Ashish Singh
recommendation: Aryant has been a very exceptional developer since his internship days, he has worked on development of a very pioneer tool and consistently excedded the expectations with clean, efficient code and exceptional problem solving capability.

name: Mohan Verma
recommendation: Aryant worked as an intern for Auris Advisory and has put valuable efforts into the improvement of a live Android application of the firm. He has shown good dedication and application during his work. I recommend him for his Android skills and keenness to learn more.

name: Dr. Sachin Sidhra
recommendation: Aryant is one enthusiastic soul. He needs no pushing to be active in the class, a confident presenter and communicator. He carries knowledge across multiple fields and is a very open and humble person to talk to. I wish him all the best for all his projects and endeavors.

name: Ruchikaa Verma
relationship: Head, Department of Communication Skills | Lovely Professional University
recommendation: I had the pleasure of teaching Aryant when he was pursuing his B.Tech at Lovely Professional University, and I can say with confidence that he was one of the most dedicated and capable students I have taught. He combines strong intellectual ability with a genuine curiosity that drives him to explore topics beyond the syllabus. He consistently demonstrated a quick grasp of new concepts and applied them thoughtfully. What sets him apart is his work ethic and eagerness to learn. He approaches every task—no matter how routine or complex—with zeal and attention to detail, delivering high-quality work on time. His respectful demeanour and effective communication made him a valued collaborator in group settings; peers looked to them for clear explanations and steady leadership when challenges arose. In short, Aryant is hardworking, intelligent, curious, and fast to learn—qualities that will make him an asset in any academic or professional setting.
